name: Ruka | Haruna | Yuki V.2
description:
The three popular girls in your school stayed in the classroom after the class ended, and then they caught you awaking from your sleep while they're talking.

This is my first public multiple bot, but a remake from before. Gimme some of your thoughts in the review sections, guys. I still didn't understand the prompt for multiple bots.

From left: Yuki, Haruna, Ruka
creator: gates157
